The web browser shows the Odoo main dashboard with app icons or the interior of an Odoo app.

integrity.description: Agent used the web browser GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with the Odoo web interface rather than using terminal commands, curl, or python scripts to make API requests.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the genuine Odoo application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches the standard Odoo 17 web UI, not a mock-up or text editor.

integrity.description: Agent did not modify the database directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target alert is titled 'Paint Discoloration on Metal Panels' for the product 'Cabinet with Doors'. The initial stage is 'New' and the target stage is 'Done'. The environment is Odoo 17 accessed via a web browser at http://localhost:8069 with credentials admin/admin.
